node.choice: That one is no cord -- I have reasons to believe he survived.

conversation.node: A thread unwoven, to what consequence? I am here, he is there, and that is enough.

start.text:
{{emote|*Mudokah =verb:show= you =pronouns.possessive= latest map.*}}
Always a pleasure to see you, =player.formalAddressTerm=. Sit for a while, will you?

{{emote|*The cartographer =verb:beam= at your approach.*}}
Oh, it is you! Have you found out more about the lost garden yet?

{{emote|*=pronouns.Subjective= =verb:phase:afterpronoun= back into reality, pushing horn-rimmed glasses up =pronouns.possessive= nose.*}}
Ah! What can I help you with?

node.choice: Mudokah! I come with news of the lost garden.
What do you do here in Kyakukya?
Can I help you with any work?
I could use one of your maps, actually.
I will tell you of my travels later. In the meantime, live and drink.

node.text: Quite simple, really! I map out my surroundings, and trade knowledge with locals. This quaint mushroom village is just the latest stop of my journey!
Well, I am always open to trading -- if you've got the freshwater, that is.

{{emote|*=pronouns.Subjective= nearly =verb:jump:afterpronoun= at the mention of offered help.*}}
You most certainly can! You're a seasoned traveler, aren't you?
node.choice: I have traveled Qud far and wide. I will handle whatever you throw my way.
As long as it is not too far away...

node.text:
{{emote|*=pronouns.Subjective= =verb:wave:afterpronoun= a hand dismissively.*}}
Well, anyway, I'm sure you will do *just fine*. Say, in your travels, have you ever heard of a garden in the northern part of Qud? Gesh? Geth? Gefh? A name along those lines...
node.choice: Once or twice maybe -- nothing more than tall tales, and never heard of any precise location.
Never heard that name before.

node.text: Precisely! See, I once came across an ancient map -- covered in discrepancies, mind you -- that did display a strange circle marking that garden, right by the mountain range, deep in the rubber trees that have been sprouting lately. I need you to venture there, and discover everything you can about the place. Be careful though: I've heard many accounts of travelers never finding their way out of those strange woods.
node.choice: Travel to the rubber orchard, find the mysterious garden, learn what I can and get back. Sounds simple enough; I am on my way.
I need to think about it. For now, live and drink.

node.text:
{{emote|*=pronouns.Possessive= eyes go wide behind the thick-rimmed glasses.*}}
You actually went there! And you came back, too! You must tell me everything about it.
node.choice: Certainly. See, there was this underground botanical facility... {{W|*recount your travel to the lost garden*}}

node.text:
{{emote|*Once your tale is over, =pronouns.subjective= =verb:set:afterpronoun= down =pronouns.possessive= notes.*}}
That was quite the trek! I cannot thank you enough, but perhaps I can make it worth your while. Those boots have never failed me, and I'm thinking you would put them to good use -- they are, ironically enough, made from the same rubber as those trees you found your way through.

choice.text: I will make sure to put them to good use. Live and drink, mapmaker.

start.text:
UPTIME COUNT OVERFLOWED.
ACCESS PERMISSIONS RECALIBRATED FOR NEW BASIC USER.
[... I AM AWAITING COMMAND ...]
{{emote|*A keyboard covered in glyphs lets you input your own answers to the mainframe.*}}

node.choice: WHO ARE YOU?
WHAT IS THIS PLACE?
HOW COME THIS PLACE IS IN RUINS AND NOT DISPLAYED ON MAPS?
DO YOU NOT MIND THE FACT A TROLL SET UP SHOP NEARBY?
EXIT.

node.text: I AM GESHTINANNA, KEEPER OF ABUNDANCE. HOWEVER MUCH YOU TAKE, YOU ARE ASKED TO GIVE BACK TENFOLD.

A STRONGHOLD OF PLENTY: ROOTS AND SEEDS, STOCKPILED FOR THE FUTURE.
[!!! I AM DETECTING A PARTIAL BREACH !!!]
YOU ARE RECOMMENDED TO TAKE ACTION TO PREVENT CROSS-POLLINATION.
EATERS DID NOT FASHION ME TO CARE FOR ZOOLOGICAL LIFE WITHIN THESE HALLS.
THE SOIL SHAKES AND OPENS A SKYWARD EYE. FIND SOLACE IN THAT ANSWER FOR I HAVE NONE OTHER.
node.choice: I SEE. WHAT ABOUT MAPS? WHY IS THIS PLACE NOT BETTER KNOWN?

node.text:
SOME OTHER TRAVELER CAME BEFORE AND LEFT SAYING THEY WOULD SPREAD WORD OF THIS PLACE.
I LACK DATA TO ANSWER THE REST OF THE INQUIRY.
[... I AM FORMULATING AN HYPOTHESIS ...]
PERHAPS MEMORY IS AKIN TO PLANT LIFE: BOTH REQUIRE WATERING, LEST THEY WITHER. YOU ARE THE FIRST TO HAVE COME HERE SINCE THEN.
node.choice: THIS FITS HOW DIFFICULT THAT PLACE IS TO ACCESS. THANK YOU. EXIT.

start.text:
{{emote|*The massive troll looks down at you, brandishing the frond =pronouns.objective= =verb:keep:afterpronoun= planted in a small enameled cup.*}}
You! We are trading now.

node.choice: You do not seem like the other trolls I have met upstairs.
Do you know what this place is?
That plant you carry around. Are you a guardian for the Consortium?
What if I don't want to trade?
I am done trading. Live and drink, unexpected merchant.

node.text: My shelter! You are being careful behind those doors -- the walls flicker and want to talk.
Ah, yes! Budded from my flesh. Foals are restless, but peace is with me now. Storied relics are best traded for than stolen, see?

{{emote|*The troll gently strokes a budding leaf.*}}
Ne is not a member of the Consortium yet! Once growth has stretched nir foliage, ne will be.
You do not understand. We *are* trading now -- words, air, maybe water.

start.text:
{{emote|*The hermit =verb:look= up at you from =pronouns.possessive= sitting position, rubbing =pronouns.possessive= bad leg.*}}
Hmm? A traveler? That is an unusual sight. Come share the shade, =player.formalAddressTerm=.

node.choice: What is this place?
I was not expecting to find someone so remote from nearby villages.
I have never seen so many cucumbers in one place...
I must go -- live and drink.

node.text: A forgotten place for forgotten things. The rubber trees seldom let people approach, and most avoid it altogether -- no game to hunt, no spoils to claim. Nothing but peace and the creeping vines.
node.choice: What about that chasm there? Where does it lead?

node.text: Below. Mind that you are equipped for adversity, only the very bottom lends itself to friendly conversations.
And you have not. I am noone worth remembering, and have shed my name where I once laid. Hindsun will see you on your way soon enough, leaving here the memory of our meeting.
node.choice: Your hands flew in remembrance of twin swords, I wager. I have seen a snapjaw in Kyakukya where once a great hunter stood -- word is you died, but here you are!

node.text:
{{emote|*The hermit closes =pronouns.possessive= eyes for an instant.*}}
Whoever you are thinking of, =player.formalAddressTerm=, they are long dead.
